meaning: n.集合,合流,群众,场所,中央广场,宽阔的大街
examples: From inside the store, I'd begun to see the people rushing by outside in the mall's concourse as a river of humanity.
But he'd had a Concourse address, like all the brats.
Hugo would lope along the Concourse with his daughter on his back-the entire boulevard her domain.
Maybe you took a few hundred quick strides through an airport concourse to catch a plane.
Up at Camden Yards, perusing the concourse unfettered before the Orioles-Mets game was a breeze.
